test_strategy_covers_all_types.detail: Strategy covers unit (70%), integration (20%), E2E (10%), security, and performance testing

test_cases_for_all_requirements.detail: 164 test cases covering all 11 in-scope requirements (FR-001 through FR-011), 44 acceptance criteria

traceability_matrix_complete.detail: 100% requirement coverage - all 44 in-scope ACs mapped to test cases in test-traceability-matrix.csv

test_data_strategy_documented.detail: Test data plan includes boundary values, invalid inputs, maximum-size inputs, fixture location

critical_paths_identified.detail: P0: router.js, registry.js, lexical.js (core routing/fallback). P1: ranker.js, config.js, detection.js, install.js

extends_existing_infrastructure.detail: Uses node:test runner, node:assert/strict, existing test-helpers.js, ESM pattern for lib/ tests

constitutional_compliance.detail: Articles II (test-first), VII (traceability 100%), IX (gate integrity), XI (mutation/adversarial testing) - all compliant
